hero.title: Your Body Has Patterns.
hero.subtitle: Finally See Them.
hero.desc: Understand your cycle, mood, symptoms, and energy through beautifully visualized body intelligence.

rhythms.title: The Living Rhythm
rhythms.desc: A cinematic representation of your hormonal journey, mapped across 28 days of evolution.
rhythms.menstrualDesc: Introspection and renewal. Hormonal parameters are at their lowest baseline. Focus on gentle recovery and magnesium.
rhythms.follicularDesc: Rising estrogen drives high cognitive focus and social confidence. The "Spring" of your internal calendar.
rhythms.ovulationDesc: Peak estrogen and testosterone triggers ovulation. Physical stamina, verbal fluency, and social confidence peak.
rhythms.lutealDesc: Progesterone builds up, directing energy inward. Ideal for detail-oriented work, nesting, and grounding routines.

science.title: Mapping The Invisible Shifts.
science.desc: Luna translates microscopic hormonal shifts into macro-level life insights. Every ripple in your cycle creates a wave in your experience.

neuralMap.title: The Neural Map
neuralMap.desc: Our AI core builds a private neural network of your specific symptoms and patterns.

prediction.title: The Prediction Core
prediction.desc: A volumetric diagnostic engine projecting your future body states with cinematic precision.

biometrics.title: Your Body Is Constantly Communicating.
biometrics.desc: Luna decodes autonomic responses to map the exact relationship between chemical shifts and lifestyle inputs.
biometrics.energyDesc: Fluctuations in estrogen dictate cellular metabolic rates. Identify your physical baseline to structure high-impact output during your follicular phase and lower intensities during luteal entry.
biometrics.moodDesc: Chemical changes subtly shape emotional resilience. Map these shifts to cycle phases to transform mood variability into intuitive self-knowledge.
biometrics.sleepDesc: Fluctuating core body temperature affects deep and REM recovery periods. By syncing sleep schedules to hormonal cycles, you can improve recovery efficiency.
biometrics.symptomDesc: Identify triggers causing physical discomfort. Luna maps how factors like caffeine intake, hydration, and stress levels affect cramps, bloating, and fatigue.

features.desc1: The Luna interface is engineered for zero friction. Every tap is a step toward total self-mastery.
features.loggingDesc: Swipe-to-log symptoms in less than 3 seconds.
features.vaultDesc: Your data is yours. End-to-end medical encryption.

wisdom.title: Listen To Your Body.
wisdom.magnesiumTip: "Your body is asking for more magnesium today."
wisdom.magnesiumTipDesc: Autonomic markers indicate light uterine strain as progesterone transitions. Synced hydration and taking magnesium targets smooth recovery during late luteal entry.
wisdom.magnesiumFooter: Based on sleep architecture and recovery index variance
wisdom.forecastDesc: Cognitive focus is peaking as estrogen levels rise. Save complex logic problems or critical writing for this performance window.
wisdom.socialDesc: Estrogen and testosterone surges peak. You are entering your most expressive phase—ideal for collaboration.
wisdom.recoveryDesc: HRV variance trends slightly lower as baseline body temperature rises. Focus on gentle recovery.
wisdom.sleepPrepText: "Deep sleep cycles projected to extend by 15m."
wisdom.sleepPrepDesc: Lower progesterone ranges prompt deeper recovery stages. Sleep early to capture this natural optimization wave.

metrics.widget1Desc: Luna decodes endocrine patterns, consistently reducing forecasting error below standard thresholds.
metrics.widget2Desc: Our system processes biometric entries globally, building the most extensive anonymous database of female health.
metrics.widget3Desc: Consistently ranked as a premium experience, combining interface luxury with medical efficacy.

trust.badge: Aligned with Nature • Driven by Science
trust.title: Your Rhythm. Your Superpower.
trust.desc: Luna translates the micro-fluctuations of your cycle into daily personal wisdom. Begin a new, harmonious relationship with your biology today.
trust.card1Desc: Zero-knowledge local encryption. Your health data remains strictly on your device.
trust.card2Desc: Built and verified in collaboration with leading gynecologists and researchers.
trust.card3Desc: No data brokers, no advertisers, no compromises. We protect your privacy always.
trust.card4Desc: Luna learns your personal cycle variability to project symptoms and energy levels.
trust.card5Desc: Receive customized nutrition, sleep, and exercise advice synchronized to your cycle.
trust.card6Desc: Join a growing collective of 1M+ members aligning their schedules to biology.
trust.footerQuote: "You are not a static machine. You are a living rhythm. It's time to align."

footer.desc: Transforming how the world views women's health through cinematic intelligence and radical empathy.

auth.welcomeDesc: Create your personal cycle intelligence profile and begin understanding your body through data, patterns, and insights.
auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to sync your rhythm parameters.
auth.errorAcceptTerms: Please accept the Terms of Service.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Begin your personal cycle intelligence profile.
auth.successDesc: Welcome, {{name}}. Your secure intelligence channel is now fully online.
auth.successSub: Next, let's tailor the predictive neural nets to align with your personal bio-rhythms.

dashboard.title: LunaCare
dashboard.telemetryLogsRequired: LunaCare requires at least 3 daily telemetry logs to establish baseline biometrics. Log daily signals to unlock predictions.
dashboard.timelineSubtitle: Select a horizon node to project your future biometrics
dashboard.predictionsNotice: Predictions are dynamically updated using local Bayesian intelligence engines.
dashboard.aiRecText: "Historically, your focus peaking capacity occurs around this phase day. Recommended scheduling of complex tasks is advised."
dashboard.noLogsRegistered: No telemetry logs registered for this date. Click below to register indicators.

logger.title: Metrics Logger
logger.desc: Perform daily calibrations of sleep, stress, energy levels, and active cycle symptoms.
logger.hydrationTap: Tap a circle to log water intake cups.
logger.bodySignalsDesc: Calibrate physical recovery indexes and nervous system load.
logger.healthSummaryDesc: Based on today's logged signals: {{mood}} focus mood state, resting sleep duration of {{sleep}} hours, and active HRV rate at {{hrv}}ms. Hydration target is {{hydrationStatus}}.
logger.hydrationBelow: below target - consider drinking 2 more cups
logger.readyToSaveDesc: All required health metrics completed successfully.

profile.title: Profile
profile.partnerCodeShare: Share this with your partner. Valid for 10 minutes.
profile.syncDescription: Synchronize your cycles and wellness logs with a partner in real-time. Link your profiles to share biological insights.

mockup.estrogenMsg: "Your estrogen is leveling. Expect high cognitive focus and calm energy today."

reviews.review1: The most beautiful health app I've ever used.
reviews.review3: Radical body literacy in my pocket.
reviews.review5: A visual masterpiece and science tool.

dashboardExtra.journeyDesc: Visualize biological phase pathways and expected transitions
dashboardExtra.microInsightBody: Sleep quality and focus duration should peak soon.
dashboardExtra.bioInsightsDesc: Curated telemetry correlations processed by Luna's deep pattern recognition engine.
dashboardExtra.predictionLabDesc: Our signature adaptive engine forecasts future physiological states by analyzing continuous biometric logs.
dashboardExtra.radiantDesc: High energy, positive outlook & focused stamina.
dashboardExtra.lowenergyDesc: Resting state, slow baseline & reflective focus.
dashboardExtra.anxiousDesc: Alert, highly active nervous system & tension signals.

onboarding.welcomeDesc: Answer a few questions so we can personalize your experience and calibrate our predictive algorithms.
onboarding.lastPeriodDesc: Select the day your last menstrual flow commenced.
onboarding.lastPeriodNotice: LunaCare utilizes this baseline to forecast follicular, luteal, and ovulation milestones.
onboarding.cycleLengthDesc: What is the typical interval between the start of one period and the next?
onboarding.periodLengthDesc: How many days does active menstrual bleeding typically continue?
onboarding.healthGoalsDesc: Select your focus parameters for cycle tracking.
onboarding.lifestyleDesc: Calibrate daily wellness inputs to correlate sleep and mood patterns.
onboarding.notificationsDesc: Choose the alerts you'd like to receive on your intelligence stream.
onboarding.periodDesc: Predictive alert 2 days prior to cycle commencement.
onboarding.ovulationDesc: Alerts at peak luteinizing hormone and fertility window opening.
onboarding.wellnessTipsDesc: Personalized wellness recommendations based on current cycle phase.
onboarding.profileReadyDesc: Your biological parameters are synchronized. Here is your cycle intelligence core baseline:
